title: Research PowerShell equivalent of bash at

log.context: Research PowerShell equivalent of bash at

Posted successfully. Here's what was sent to the Discord thread:

**Summary of the 4 approaches covered:**

1. **`schtasks /create /sc once /st HH:MM /f`** — the clear winner. One line, detached, survives terminal close, survives reboots. Self-deleting variant also shown.

2. **`Register-ScheduledTask`** (PowerShell-native) — 3 lines but more composable with variables.

3. **`Start-Sleep` hack** — `Start-Sleep -Seconds ((Get-Date "14:30") - (Get-Date)).TotalSeconds; command` — dead simple but bl...(truncated)
